sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69470" key="musthri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυστηρίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, pecul. fem. of <sense id="n69470.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μυστηρικός, τελεταί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.9</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Damag.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
